docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-14-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YIP, HENRY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT S&E CAFE (999 INVESTMENT INC.) $8,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,000.00, PAYMENT ON 11-14-25 OF $1,500; PAYMENTS OF $1,625.00 ON OR BEFORE 12-18-25, 1-18-26, 2-18-26 AND 3-18-26. PROGRESS REPORT ON 3-20-26. FULL BALANCE DUE IF FAILURE TO PAY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,265.27 FILED BY YIP, HENRY AS TO DEFENDANT S&E CAFE (999 INVESTMENT INC.) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-14-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (12 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF YIP, HENRY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE WAS $0.00 SERVED OCT-24-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT S&E CAFE (999 INVESTMENT INC.)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE WAS $50.00 SERVED OCT-30-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE, NO SERVICE FEE AS TO DEFENDANT S&E CAFE (999 INVESTMENT INC.)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) WAI LEUNG CHU FILED BY DEFENDANT S&E CAFE (999 INVESTMENT INC.)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-14-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-14-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF HENRY YIP IS PRESENT. A VIETNAMESE INTERPRETER HONG HA WAS PROVIDED FOR THE PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT S & E CAFE (999 INVESTMENT INC.) IS PRESENT APPEARING ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF IS WAI LEUNG CHU. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
